name: Zinsser B-I-N White Matt Stain Block Interior Multi Surface Primer
description:
Discover the powerful performance of Zinsser B-I-N, a premium shellac-based primer, sealer, and stain killer designed for exceptional results. This versatile formula is ideal for all interior surfaces and can also be used for spot priming exterior areas, providing a robust foundation for your painting projects.

Engineered for superior adhesion, Zinsser B-I-N effortlessly bonds to challenging glossy surfaces, including glass. It effectively blocks the most persistent and stubborn stains, from watermarks to marker pen, ensuring a pristine finish. The primer also excels at sealing porous surfaces, delivering excellent enamel holdout and even tackling bleeding knots and sap streaks with ease.

Beyond its staining capabilities, Zinsser B-I-N permanently neutralizes and blocks every kind of odour, creating a fresher environment. Its rapid drying time means it's touch-dry in just 20 minutes and recoatable in 45 minutes, allowing you to complete your projects efficiently. Achieve a hard-dry finish within 1-3 days for lasting durability.
